results.title: This 'alien' blue planet rains molten glass
results.description: Scientists are stunned by HD 189733b, a blue planet 63 light-years away, resembling Earth but far more hostile. Orbiting its star in just two days, it endures scorching temperatures, supersonic winds, and glass rain. Its striking blue color stems from silicate particles scattering light, not oceans. This 'hot Jupiter' offers a stark reminder of the universe's dangerous beauty.

results.title: Suspected ISI spy detained in Jaisalmer border area; payment deposits linked to espionage under probe
results.description: A young man, Mustaq Ali, was apprehended near the Pakistan border in Jaisalmer on suspicion of spying for the ISI. He allegedly shared sensitive Indian security information for nearly two years. Investigators found suspected payments in his bank account. Multiple agencies will interrogate him further.

results.title: Understanding ITR Filing for FY26: Key Insights and Updated Procedures
results.description: This article provides crucial insights into the Income Tax Return (ITR) filing process for FY26, highlighting the importance of timely submissions and the benefits of the Updated Income Tax Return (ITR-U) mechanism. Taxpayers can rectify past omissions and update their records for previous years, while understanding the implications of penalties for late filings. With the introduction of new provisions in Budget 2026, individuals have more flexibility in managing their tax obligations. Learn how to navigate these changes effectively to ensure compliance and avoid unnecessary financial burdens.

results.title: Bitcoin Remains Steady as Rising Oil Prices Fuel Inflation Fears
results.description: Bitcoin held above $63,000 despite rising oil prices, inflation concerns, and uncertainty surrounding the upcoming Federal Reserve meeting. Analysts said improving on-chain data and stronger support...
